chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4926 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 03.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Yaseen Jokhio, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdus Samad, Advocate for NADRA. Mr. Muhammad Javed Khaliq, D.A.G. Mr. Mehran Khan, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Amin Ahmed, Assistant Director Passport..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned Counsel for the NADRA submits that the case of the Petitioner is to be scrutinized by the concerned DLC, which will verify his antecedents and his national status. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the DLC has already undertaken the exercise in that regard, however, the comments submitted on behalf of the DLC and the documents enclosed therewith do not even reflect which documents were produced and scrutinized for purpose of evaluating the Petitioner’s case. Under such circumstances, we deem it proper that the matter be considered afresh. The Petitioner is directed to appear before the DLC along with all relevant documents, which shall examine the same so as to then decide the case of the Petitioner through a speaking order. Let such exercise be carried out and concluded within a period of four weeks from today. The petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. Let a copy of this Order be transmitted to the Respondent No.4 for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
